creator: hoek@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Sep 19, 1998 at 08:33:13PM +0700, anto@netscape.net wrote:
> 

Or, if you want to be a little cuter...

> *** 1596,1602 ****
>   .if !target(distclean)
>   distclean: pre-distclean clean
>         @${ECHO_MSG} "===>  Dist cleaning for ${PKGNAME}"
> !       @(if [ -d ${_DISTDIR} ]; then \
>                 cd ${_DISTDIR}; \
>                 ${RM} -f ${DISTFILES} ${PATCHFILES}; \

-		${RM} -f ${DISTFILES} ${PATCHFILES}; \
+		${RM} -f "" ${DISTFILES} ${PATCHFILES}; \


>   distclean: pre-distclean clean
>         @${ECHO_MSG} "===>  Dist cleaning for ${PKGNAME}"
> !       @(if [ "X${DISTFILES}${PATCHFILES}" != "X" -a -d ${_DISTDIR} ]; then \
>                 cd ${_DISTDIR}; \
>                 ${RM} -f ${DISTFILES} ${PATCHFILES}; \
>         fi)
> 
> 	
> 
> >Audit-Trail:
> >Unformatted:
> 
> To Unsubscribe: send mail to majordomo@FreeBSD.org
> with "unsubscribe freebsd-ports" in the body of the message
